overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (GTA IV) showing a character in a red leather jacket walking along a waterfront promenade in a modern city at night. The character explores a cobblestone path beside illuminated skyscrapers, passes a lit monument, descends to a wooden dock to observe a speedboat, then returns to continue along the riverside walkway.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront promenade with illuminated skyscrapers visible across the water

notable_agents.action: walking toward the camera along the promenade path

entered.detail: tall modern office buildings with illuminated windows forming the city skyline
deciduous trees with orange and red autumn foliage lining the walkway
wet reflective cobblestone pathway running alongside the water
metal railing separating the walkway from the water's edge
low-rise building with illuminated signage and storefronts

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a cobblestone waterfront promenade at night, with autumn trees on the left and a commercial building on the right. The illuminated glass skyscrapers of the city skyline dominate the background across the water, while a few pedestrians walk in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: monument plaza with outdoor cafe seating

events.description: approaching the ornate stone lamp monument with multiple globes

agents.ego_description: walking past the illuminated stone monument and outdoor cafe seating area

entered.detail: tall ornate stone pillar with multiple spherical lamps illuminating the area
tables and chairs under umbrellas outside the commercial building

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and passes a prominent stone lamp monument with multiple illuminated globes. To the right, outdoor cafe seating is visible in front of the commercial building. The autumn trees recede behind as the character moves forward along the cobblestone path toward the water's edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden dock extending over dark water

events.description: descends wooden stairs from promenade to the lower dock level
approaches speedboat moored alongside the wooden dock

agents.ego_description: walking down wooden stairs to the dock and approaching the water's edge to observe the moored boat

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming the dock surface extending over the water
red and white speedboat floating alongside the dock with cabin lights on
tall stone retaining wall with architectural lighting illuminating the facade

segments.scene_description: The character descends to a wooden dock extending over the dark water, leaving the cobblestone promenade behind. A red and white speedboat is moored alongside the dock, gently bobbing in the water. The stone embankment wall rises on the right, lit by artificial lights, while the character walks along the dock to observe the boat.

events.description: ascends stairs from dock back to upper promenade level

agents.ego_description: climbing back up to the promenade and continuing along the riverside walkway toward the illuminated bridge

notable_agents.action: couple walking ahead along the path toward the bridge

entered.detail: ornate bridge structure with flags and decorative lighting spanning the water

segments.scene_description: The character ascends back to the cobblestone promenade level, leaving the dock behind. The path continues toward a historic bridge with decorative flags visible in the distance. Other pedestrians walk ahead in the same direction, and the autumn trees return to line the right side of the path while the glass skyscrapers shift to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a nighttime waterfront promenade that descends to a moored boat before returning to a city walkway. It begins with the character walking along a cobblestone path flanked by autumn trees and commercial buildings, with illuminated glass skyscrapers dominating the skyline across the water. As the character moves forward, the scene passes a stone lamp monument with glowing globes and outdoor cafe seating before the path leads down toward the water's edge. The camera then follows the character as they descend onto a wooden dock to observe a red and white speedboat bobbing against a lit stone embankment. Finally, the character ascends back to the promenade level, where the path continues toward a distant historic bridge with decorative flags as the skyscrapers shift to the left.
